story: Soul singer Otis Redding's voice still echoes through time. In 1968, on March 11, he became the first person in America to receive a gold record after his death. story: Dr. Frances Mary Adams made history in 1953. She became the first woman to be commissioned as an army doctor. This groundbreaking achievement opened doors for women in military medicine.
